summary: Tested AU regulatory compliance features, Strategic Planning combined page, Data Import wizard, Financial Recommendations clickable actions, and navigation redirects. All major features working correctly.

issues: Sidebar scroll position resets to top after page navigation - minor UX issue, doesn't significantly impact usability

passed_tests: Compliance modal shows on first visit with ASIC/ATO/Corporations Act references
Compliance modal has checkbox and 'I Understand & Accept' button
Compliance modal button disabled until checkbox is checked
Compliance acknowledgement persists in localStorage after accepting
Compliance modal does NOT reappear on subsequent page visits
ComplianceFooter component visible on Strategic Planning page
ComplianceFooter component visible on Data Import page
Strategic Planning page (/strategic-planning) loads correctly
Strategic Planning has all 4 main tabs: Lifecycle, Scenarios, Compare, What-If
Strategic Planning Lifecycle tab has 3 sub-tabs: Retirement, Estate, Goals
Strategic Planning Scenarios tab shows scenario builder with market assumptions
Strategic Planning Compare tab shows net worth comparison chart
Strategic Planning What-If tab shows scenario rankings and key insights
Data Import page (/data-import) loads correctly
Data Import has CSV, Excel, Xero Export, MYOB Export format options
Data Import has Family Members, Properties, Share Holdings, Transactions data types
Data Import shows Xero export instructions
Data Import shows MYOB export instructions
Data Import has Download Template button
Data Import has file upload drop zone
Financial Recommendations page has clickable action buttons
Financial Recommendations 'Rebalance portfolio' action navigates to /strategic-planning
Navigation to /lifecycle-planning redirects to /strategic-planning
Navigation to /scenario-modeling redirects to /strategic-planning
Sidebar navigation has Strategic Planning link under Planning section
Sidebar navigation has Data Import link under Data & Reports section
critical_code_review_comments: ComplianceDisclaimer.jsx properly implements ASIC RG 234, Corporations Act 2001 s911A, ATO Tax Practitioner Guidelines, and Australian Consumer Law references
Strategic Planning page successfully combines Lifecycle, Scenarios, Compare, and What-If functionality into a single page
Data Import wizard provides clear step-by-step process with Xero/MYOB export instructions
Financial Recommendations action buttons use navigate() for proper React Router navigation
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js PortfolioContext
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new AU regulatory compliance features: 1) ComplianceModal shows on first visit with ASIC/ATO/Corporations Act disclaimers, persists acknowledgement in localStorage, 2) ComplianceFooter visible on pages, 3) Strategic Planning page at /strategic-planning combines Lifecycle (Retirement/Estate/Goals), Scenarios, Compare, and What-If tabs, 4) Data Import page at /data-import supports CSV/Excel/Xero/MYOB with export instructions, 5) Financial Recommendations action buttons navigate correctly (e.g., Rebalance -> /strategic-planning), 6) Old routes /lifecycle-planning and /scenario-modeling redirect to /strategic-planning. Minor issue: sidebar scroll position resets on navigation but doesn't significantly impact UX.

components: Compare tab with net worth comparison
Strategic Planning link in Planning section
Data Import link in Data & Reports section
sidebar_navigation.minor_issue: Sidebar scroll position resets on navigation
